Connecting a wallet

Allows read access

By connecting a wallet to a website, you are allowing the site to read the contents of your wallet. This does not approve a transaction.

Bridge

It's here! Claim your Base Quest Anniversary NFT

A special thank you from us for being an early builder on Base, at the anniversary of the first Base Builder Quest.

Starting today, we invite all Base users to celebrate our very first anniversary with us. We have prepared numerous rewards for our dearest users to commemorate the momentum we've built together such as an exclusive NFT & much more.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I claim my NFT?

It’s easy!

  1. 1. Select the wallet with the most activity and transactions.
  2. 2. Connect your wallet to Base mainnet
  3. 3. Make sure you’ve got ETH for the gas fee
  4. 4. Click “Connect”
  5. 5. That’s it! Your NFT will be minted and appear in your wallet.

Who is eligible to claim the Base Quest Anniversary NFT?

All users are eligible to claim the Base Quest Anniversary NFT, ensuring that everyone has the opportunity to participate and enjoy the benefits associated with it.

Why can’t I claim my NFT?

Only builders who completed last year’s onchain quest and claimed the NFT on the Base Goerli testnet are eligible to claim the mainnet NFT. Please use the wallet that holds the testnet NFT, otherwise you won’t be able to claim.

What is the value of the NFT? The benefit of me holding one?

This NFT not only signifies ownership but also guarantees your participation in future quests, allows you to claim USDC and Base ETH, and provides early access to pre-sale Base Memecoins. These benefits make it a valuable asset within our ecosystem.
